title: Igbo Cosmology: Chukwu and the Four Market Days
description: The Igbo creation account: Chukwu, the great spirit, orders the world into four market days and sends Chi as each person's guardian spirit.
introduction: The Igbo creation account: Chukwu, the great spirit, orders the world into four market days and sends Chi as each person's guardian spirit.

translation.original_text: Chukwu kere uwa. O nyere mmadu chi ya.
translation.text: Chukwu created the world. He gave each person their chi.
